evals.prompt: ok the research plan is done for my AI pharma research project at ~/research-projects/ai-pharma-discovery. go ahead and gather findings and sources
evals.expected_output: Should check prerequisites (planning_complete), discover execution batches via script, then begin parallel findings-creator agents. Should explain the two-phase process and report progress per batch.

evals.prompt: I had to stop the research midway through the findings phase on my project at ~/research-projects/ai-pharma-discovery. can you pick up where we left off?
evals.expected_output: Should run scan-resumption-state.sh --phase 3 to detect completed vs pending questions. Should skip completed questions and only process pending ones. Should explain what was already done.

evals.prompt: run the web research on my project at ~/research-projects/ai-pharma-discovery but I'm only interested in dimensions 1 and 3 — skip the rest, we're short on time
evals.expected_output: Should acknowledge the user's constraint but explain the tradeoff — skipping dimensions creates gaps in coverage that affect downstream claims and synthesis. Should either filter to those dimensions or ask for confirmation before proceeding with partial coverage.
